have h_id (a b c : ℝ) : a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = a*(b-c)^2*(b+c-a) + b*(a-b)*(a-c)*(a+b-c) := by ring
  obtain h | h := max_choice a (max b c)
  · have h_ba : b ≤ a := by linarith [le_max_left b c, le_max_right a (max b c), h]
    have h_ca : c ≤ a := by linarith [le_max_right b c, le_max_right a (max b c), h]
    rw [h_id a b c]; nlinarith
  · obtain hb | hc := max_choice b c
    · have h_cb : c ≤ b := by linarith [le_max_right b c, hb]
      have h_ab : a ≤ b := by linarith [le_max_left a (max b c), h, hb]
      rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) + a^2*b*(a-b) by ring, h_id b c a]
      nlinarith
    · have h_ac : a ≤ c := by linarith [le_max_left a (max b c), h, hc]
      have h_bc : b ≤ c := by linarith [le_max_left b c, hc]
      rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = c^2*a*(c-a) + a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) by ring, h_id c a b]
      nlinarith

  · rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = a*(b-c)^2*(b+c-a) + b*(a-b)*(a-c)*(a+b-c) by ring]; nlinarith
  · rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = b*(c-a)^2*(c+a-b) + c*(b-c)*(b-a)*(b+c-a) by ring]; nlinarith

let x := (b + c - a) / 2
  let y := (a + c - b) / 2
  let z := (a + b - c) / 2
  have ha : a = y + z := by linarith
  have hb : b = z + x := by linarith
  have hc : c = x + y := by linarith
  have hx : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
  have hy : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
  have hz : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
  rw [ha, hb, hc]
  have : (y + z) ^ 2 * (z + x) * (y + z - (z + x)) + (z + x) ^ 2 * (x + y) * (z + x - (x + y)) + (x + y) ^ 2 * (y + z) * (x + y - (y + z)) =
    2 * (x * z * (x - y) ^ 2 + y * x * (y - z) ^ 2 + z * y * (z - x) ^ 2) := by ring
  rw [this]
  nlinarith

  rcases max_choice a (max b c) with h | h

      nlinarith
    · rw [h', max_eq_right_iff] at h; have h'' : b ≤ c := max_eq_right_iff.mp h'
      rw [show a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = c * (a - b)^2 * (a + b - c) + a * (c - a) * (c - b) * (c + a - b) by ring]
      nlinarith

have h_id : ∀ {x y z : ℝ}, x^2 * y * (x - y) + y^2 * z * (y - z) + z^2 * x * (z - x) = x * (y - z)^2 * (y + z - x) + y * (x - y) * (x - z) * (x + y - z) := by intro; ring
  rcases le_total a b with hab | hba
  · rcases le_total b c with hbc | hcb
    · rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = c^2*a*(c-a) + a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) by ring, h_id]; nlinarith
    · rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) + a^2*b*(a-b) by ring, h_id]; nlinarith
  · rcases le_total a c with hac | hca
    · rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = c^2*a*(c-a) + a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) by ring, h_id]; nlinarith
    · rw [h_id]; nlinarith

have h_min : ∀ {x y z : ℝ}, 0 < x → 0 < y → 0 < z → z < x + y → y < x + z → x < y + z → x ≤ y → x ≤ z → 0 ≤ x^2 * y * (x - y) + y^2 * z * (y - z) + z^2 * x * (z - x) := by
    intros x y z hx hy hz hzxy hyxz hxyz hxy hxz
    rw [show x^2 * y * (x - y) + y^2 * z * (y - z) + z^2 * x * (z - x) = y * (x - y) * (x - z) * (x + y - z) + x * (y - z)^2 * (y + z - x) by ring]
    nlinarith
  obtain hab | hba := le_total a b
  · obtain hac | hca := le_total a c
    · exact h_min h₀.1 h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2 h₁ h₂ h₃ hab hac
    · rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = c^2*a*(c-a) + a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) by ring]
      exact h_min h₀.2.2 h₀.1 h₀.2.1 h₂ h₃ h₁ hca (hca.trans hab)
  · obtain hbc | hcb := le_total b c
    · rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) + a^2*b*(a-b) by ring]
      exact h_min h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2 h₀.1 h₃ h₁ h₂ hbc hba
    · rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = c^2*a*(c-a) + a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) by ring]
      exact h_min h₀.2.2 h₀.1 h₀.2.1 h₂ h₃ h₁ (hcb.trans hba) hcb

wlog h : c ≥ a ∧ c ≥ b using a b c
  · rcases (max_choice a (max b c)) with h' | h' | h'
    · rw [max_eq_left (le_max_left b c)] at h'; exact this b c a h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2 h₀.1 h₂ h₃ h₁ (by ring_nf; exact ⟨h', le_of_not_and_not h⟩)
    · rw [max_eq_right (le_max_left b c)] at h'; exact this b c a h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2 h₀.1 h₂ h₃ h₁ (by ring_nf; exact ⟨h', le_of_not_and_not h⟩)
    · exact this a b c h₀ h₁ h₂ h₃ (by exact ⟨le_of_max_le h', le_of_max_le h'⟩)
  · have : a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = (a + b - c) * b * (a - b)^2 + (a + c - b) * a * (c - a) * (c - b) := by ring
    rw [this]
    nlinarith

wlog h : a ≤ b ∧ a ≤ c
  · obtain ⟨h'⟩ := this b c a h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2 h₀.1 h₃ h₁ h₂
    obtain ⟨h''⟩ := this c a b h₀.2.2 h₀.1 h₀.2.1 h₂ h₃ h₁
    cases' (min_cases a b c) with h1 h2
    · exact h1
    · cases' h2 with h2 h3
      · exact h' h2
      · exact h'' h3
  · have identity : a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = a*(b-c)^2*(b+c-a) + b*(a-b)*(a-c)*(a+b-c) := by ring
    rw [identity]
    nlinarith

    (a + b - c) * (b + c - a) * (a - b)^2 +
    (b + c - a) * (c + a - b) * (b - c)^2 +
    (c + a - b) * (a + b - c) * (c - a)^2 by ring]

  let y := (c + a - b) / 2
  let z := (a + b - c) / 2

  have : a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = 2 * (x * y * (y - z) ^ 2 + y * z * (z - x) ^ 2 + z * x * (x - y) ^ 2) := by
    rw [ha, hb, hc]; ring
  nlinarith

    · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg hx (pow_two_nonneg _)) (by linarith)
    · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg hy (mul_nonneg (by linarith) (by linarith))) (by linarith)
  rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  have h_max : a ≥ b ∧ a ≥ c ∨ b ≥ a ∧ b ≥ c ∨ c ≥ a ∧ c ≥ b := by linarith
  rcases h_max with ⟨hab, hac⟩ | ⟨hba, hbc⟩ | ⟨hca, hcb⟩
  · exact h ha hb hc h₁ h₂ h₃ hab hac
  · rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) + a^2*b*(a-b) by ring]
    exact h hb hc ha h₃ h₁ h₂ hbc hba
  · rw [show a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) + c^2*a*(c-a) = c^2*a*(c-a) + a^2*b*(a-b) + b^2*c*(b-c) by ring]
    exact h hc ha hb h₂ h₃ h₁ hca hcb

specialize this c a b h₀ h₃ h₁ h₂; rw [add_assoc] at this; apply this; apply this; exact ⟨le_trans hab hbc, hbc⟩
      · specialize this b c a h₀ h₂ h₃ h₁; rw [add_assoc] at this; apply this; apply this; exact ⟨hba, hcb⟩
    · rcases le_total a c with hac | hca
      · specialize this c a b h₀ h₃ h₁ h₂; rw [add_assoc] at this; apply this; apply this; exact ⟨hac, hba⟩
      · apply this; exact h₀; exact h₁; exact h₂; exact h₃; exact ⟨hba, hca⟩
  · rcases le_total b c with hbc | hcb
    · by_cases hb2ac : b^2 - a * c ≥ 0
      · apply add_nonneg; apply mul_nonneg; apply mul_nonneg h₀.1; linarith; nlinarith; apply mul_nonneg; apply mul_nonneg h₀.3; linarith; exact hb2ac
      · have : a * (a - b) * (a * b - c^2) + c * (b - c) * (b^2 - a * c) = a * (a - b) * (a * b - c^2) - c * (b - c) * (a * c - b^2) := by ring
        rw [this]; apply sub_nonneg; apply le_trans; rotate_left
        · apply mul_le_mul; apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left; linarith; exact h₀.3; linarith; nlinarith; exact mul_nonneg h₀.3 (sub_nonneg.2 hbc)
        · apply mul_le_mul; apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left; linarith; exact h₀.1; linarith; nlinarith; exact mul_nonneg h₀.1 (sub_nonneg.2 h_max.1)
    · have : a * (a - b) * (a * b - c^2) + c * (b - c) * (b^2 - a * c) = a * (a - c) * (a * b - c^2) + b * (c - b) * (a^2 - b * c) := by ring
      rw [this]; by_cases habc2 : a * b - c^2 ≥ 0
      · apply add_nonneg; apply mul_nonneg; apply mul_nonneg h₀.1; linarith; exact habc2; apply mul_nonneg; apply mul_nonneg h₀.2; linarith; nlinarith
      · have : a * (a - c) * (a * b - c^2) + b * (c - b) * (a^2 - b * c) = b * (c - b) * (a^2 - b * c) - a * (a - c) * (c^2 - a * b) := by ring
        rw [this]; apply sub_nonneg; apply le_trans; rotate_left
        · apply mul_le_mul; apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left; linarith; exact h₀.1; linarith; nlinarith; exact mul_nonneg h₀.1 (sub_nonneg.2 h_max.2)
        · apply mul_le_mul; have : b * (a^2 - b * c) ≥ a * (c^2 - a * b) := by nlinarith
          exact this; linarith; linarith; apply mul_nonneg h₀.2; linarith
